code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0

while i < n
  mut line = ""
  mut in_line = true
  while in_line
    if i >= n
      in_line = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 10
          i = i + 1
          in_line = false
        else
          if b == 13
            i = i + 1
          else
            line = "#{line}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
            i = i + 1
          end
        end
      when None
        in_line = false
      end
    end
  end

  let llen = string.len(line)
  mut j = 0

  mut s1 = true
  while s1
    if j >= llen
      s1 = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          j = j + 1
        else
          s1 = false
        end
      when None
        s1 = false
      end
    end
  end

  mut t1 = true
  while t1
    if j >= llen
      t1 = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          t1 = false
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      when None
        t1 = false
      end
    end
  end

  mut s2 = true
  while s2
    if j >= llen
      s2 = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          j = j + 1
        else
          s2 = false
        end
      when None
        s2 = false
      end
    end
  end

  mut tok = ""
  mut t2 = true
  while t2
    if j >= llen
      t2 = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          t2 = false
        else
          tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
          j = j + 1
        end
      when None
        t2 = false
      end
    end
  end

  if not string.is_empty(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      sum = sum + v
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

print("sum=#{sum}")
